## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential partnership and collaboration opportunities between GrowthX and you.com](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [You.com is pivoting towards enterprise-focused composable infrastructure for AI, offering APIs and custom agent building capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [GrowthX specializes in expert-led AI-powered growth strategies, particularly content creation and marketing](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Both parties expressed interest in a strategic partnership, combining you.com's API capabilities with GrowthX's content strategy expertise](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=621.0)
  - [Potential collaboration on evaluating and improving you.com's API performance against competitors](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

## Topics

### You.com's Business Evolution

  - [Shifted focus to enterprise-grade composable infrastructure for AI](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Offers 6-7 different APIs for developers to build AI applications](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=386.0)
  - [Provides multi-model approach, unifying various LLMs for optimal output](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=762.0)
  - [Targeting both API users (developers) and custom agent builders (enterprises)](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### GrowthX's Services and Capabilities

  - [Offers AI-powered content creation and marketing strategies](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1234.0)
  - [Uses advanced AI workflows for research, content generation, and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1539.0)
  - [Works with high-profile clients like Ramp, Webflow, and Udemy](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1375.0)
  - [Provides comprehensive 8-week strategy sprints followed by ongoing execution](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1155.0)

### Potential Partnership Opportunities

  - [GrowthX to evaluate and benchmark you.com's API against competitors](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Collaborate on developing evals and improving API performance](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [GrowthX to potentially use you.com's API in their content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)
  - [Explore creating a content strategy similar to Exa.ai, leveraging you.com's API](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=1645.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Proposal to create topic hubs and user-generated content pages on you.com](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4497.0)
  - [Leverage you.com's API to generate high-quality, accurate content at scale](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4639.0)
  - [Showcase you.com's API capabilities through created content](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4639.0)
  - [Address the challenge of quickly building and publishing pages](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4639.0)

### Marketing Challenges at you.com

  - [Current fragmented approach with multiple agencies and contractors](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=3764.0)
  - [Lack of centralized strategy and slow content production](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=3764.0)
  - [Need for improved SEO and targeted content for different ICPs](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=3764.0)
  - [Desire for an audit of current marketing efforts and web development](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=3764.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kady to review budget and consider starting with GrowthX's 8-week strategy sprint](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4864.0)
  - [Marcel to work with Tyler to send a Statement of Work (SoW) to Kady](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4878.0)
  - [GrowthX to add Kady to their Slack for easier communication and information exchange](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4993.0)
  - [Explore the possibility of using you.com's API to generate content and create a "you.com powered Wikipedia"](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4639.0)
  - [Consider ways to showcase you.com's API accuracy and comprehensiveness through content creation](https://fathom.video/share/SdtjzDmSgTCALvk53EYeJ1ox9qMHfiHh?tab=summary&timestamp=4639.0)
